issues.sample: I JUST PURCHASED THE AUTOMOBILE FROM A CHEVROLET DEALER WITH 17,200 MILES AND I HAVE NOT BEEN ABLE TO FILL THE TAKE UP WITH GAS.  TWICE I HAVE TRIED TO FILL THE TANK, BUT THE GAS KEEPS TURNING OFF AT THE PUMP.  WHEN I RETURN HOME AND PARK THE CAR IN THE GARAGE, YOU CAN SMELL GAS

narrative.headline: What 2014 Chevrolet Corvette owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 61 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (18% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
